title: Spartan Weaponry TFC
body:
### **Addon that allows you to use Spartan Weapons in TerrafirmaCraft**
mod works only in combination with original spartan weapons mod [[=LINK=]](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry) and TFC

-all recipes have been changed and adapted to the materials existing in TFC
However, it should be noted that if critical raw materials are missing, the recipe for a given item is invisible
example - if you do not have platinum in your resources, the Platinum Weapons will not be available for crafting

-added the ability to oil TFC weapons and give them additional stats
added simple recipes for anvil and also advanced recipes with  mods - create,  create metallurgy, Create Vingage, Mekanism, TFC IE Addon - to use advanced recipes you need to have these mods in the modpack
